title: Gamble
description: A slot machine. you can gamble. its not good... but it can be! sometimes.
body:
What if you could gamble in minecraft with little reward just like real gambling?

Well thats this!
pay gold nuggets,ingots or blocks to play the machine

Paying more allows you to get better stuff (not really good(bad at creative/interesting rewards)

but you can get just about any tier of reward like goldblock rewards from nuggets!
Its just more rare but it also works the other way. paying blocks can give nugget tier items but you can get more of that tier.


Made with Mcreator
because its easier
